extensions.schema_choice_note: Authoritative self-declaration for the TokenPak reference proxy. Schema: provider-profile used as closest-fit kind per DECISION-SC-04-A (Kevin 2026-04-22). The proxy is a TIP-proxy, not strictly a provider; provider.endpoint_pattern documents the local endpoint downstream clients point at, not an upstream URL. A dedicated proxy-profile schema would be additive in a future TIP MINOR bump.
extensions.sync_enforcement: SC-06 test asserts one-to-one sync between the capabilities array in this file and SELF_CAPABILITIES_PROXY.
